  • ImportScaleDenominator
    Role: Get the denominator value of the scale factor. That value is only taken into account when the import unit is set to Scale Factor.
    Repository: DXF
    Primary Tab Page: /General/Compatibility/DXF
  • ImportScaleNumerator
    Role: Get the numerator value of the scale factor. That value is only taken into account when the import unit is set to Scale Factor.
    Repository: DXF
    Primary Tab Page: /General/Compatibility/DXF

    Role: : Indicates if standard file is imported automatically
    Repository: GBiWGeneral

  • ImportSplineOption
    Role: If true, CADAM Splines are converted to V5 polylines using a linear approximation.
    Repository: CCDCompatibilitySettings
    Primary Tab Page: /General/Compatibility/CCD
  • ImportSplineSagValue
    Role: The sag value in MKS defines the chordal deviation used in the linear approximation.
    Repository: CCDCompatibilitySettings
    Primary Tab Page: /General/Compatibility/CCD

    Role: Directory of CADAM Symbol Tables translated into CATIA V5 Catalogs.
